data.title: Binance Alpha: The minimum requirement to claim the RollX airdrop is 242 points, and claiming it will consume 15 points.
data.description: Binance Wallet announced that Binance Alpha will be the first platform to list RollX (ROLL), with trading commencing on January 16, 2026 at 10:00 (UTC). Eligible users can participate in the airdrop application through the Alpha event page. The announcement states that users with at least 242 Binance Alpha Points can apply for 355 ROLL tokens on a first-come, first-served basis, with each application consuming 15 Alpha Points. If the reward pool is not fully allocated, the points threshold will automatically decrease by 5 points every 5 minutes. Binance reminds users that they must confirm their application within 24 hours, otherwise they will be considered to have forfeited their airdrop eligibility.

data.title: CME Group to offer cardano, chainlink, stellar futures as institutions seek regulated risk-management tools
data.description:
The CME Group has announced its intention to introduce futures contracts for popular cryptocurrencies such as Cardano, Chainlink, and Stellar. This move comes in response to the increasing demand from institutional investors who are actively seeking regulated tools for risk management in the rapidly evolving digital asset landscape. By providing these futures products, the CME Group aims to facilitate greater participation from institutional players, enabling them to hedge their positions and manage their exposure to the price volatility associated with these cryptocurrencies.
source: https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2026/01/16/cme-group-to-offer-cardano-chainlink-stellar-futures-as-institutions-seek-regulated-risk-management-tools

data.title: BitMart launches an AMM Bot market-making mechanism, allowing users to share transaction fee revenue.
data.description: According to official news, BitMart has launched a new automated market-making tool, AMM Bot, introducing automated liquidity solutions for select spot trading pairs. Based on a constant product market-making algorithm, this feature automatically places buy and sell orders across multiple price ranges through independent liquidity pools, maintaining stable trading depth for trading pairs even without manual order placement. Users simply need to deposit two assets into the pool simultaneously to participate in market making and become liquidity providers. In terms of rewards, AMM Bot provides users with the opportunity to continuously earn trading fee dividends. Transaction fees generated by the relevant trading pairs will be distributed to liquidity providers according to their liquidity contribution, allowing market-making users to share in the profits generated by market activity. Furthermore, AMM Bot supports flexible increases and decreases in liquidity, providing users with a more efficient way to utilize their funds.

data.title: Ava Labs Chief Strategy Officer Steps Down After Careful Consideration
data.description: According to Foresight News, Luigi D'Onorio DeMeo, the Chief Strategy Officer of Ava Labs, announced his resignation from the position. He stated that the decision was made after extensive discussions and reflection. Over the past few months, DeMeo has been formally transitioning his responsibilities and preparing for a new chapter in his life.
